spanish: Hasta ahora hemos visto la IA como ese asistente estilo chat GPT o Gemini que te ayuda a escribir un correo.
english: Until now we've seen AI as that assistant style chat GPT or Gemini that helps you write an email.
explanation: Present perfect tense (hemos visto) to describe experiences up to now, with a relative clause (que te ayuda)

spanish: Se ha demostrado que maizos es capaz de encontrar vulnerabilidades de día cero de forma masiva.
english: It has been shown that myzos is capable of finding zero-day vulnerabilities on a massive scale.
explanation: Passive voice with 'se ha demostrado' (it has been shown) + relative clause with 'que'

spanish: Si alguien consigue liberarlo o engañarlo, podría tirar abajo todo internet.
english: If someone manages to free it or trick it, it could bring down the entire internet.
explanation: Conditional with 'si' clause (si alguien consigue) + conditional result (podría tirar abajo)
